summary: V29.0 Autonomous Treasury testing complete. All 13 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend Apex Creator Console V29.0 verified with Four-Tiered Ledger, Soft Keys panel, Layer A SOVEREIGN faders, and all V29.0 features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/treasury/status correctly returns public telemetry with PHI=1.618033988749895
GET /api/treasury/haptic-status returns Tier 4 expansion, milestone tracking, Solfeggio pulse pattern [174, 100, 528, 100, 174] at 80% intensity
GET /api/treasury/cashflow returns waveform data with peaks (revenue) and dips (expenses)
GET /api/treasury/audit correctly returns 403 for non-Master Authority users
GET /api/treasury/audit-stream correctly returns 403 for non-Master Authority users
POST /api/treasury/voice-command correctly returns 403 for non-Master Authority users
Four-Tiered Pay Structure logic verified: T1 ESCROW (φ × 1.618%), T2 LABOR ($15/hr), T3 BUFFER ($40,000 LOCKED), T4 EXPANSION (Reservoir - Buffer - Escrow)
Apex Creator Console V29.0 UI renders with 4-Tier Ledger badge
Soft Keys panel shows Voice, Void, Vault, Mint, Audit buttons
Layer A SOVEREIGN faders show EQUITY GAIN, KEYSTONE, ESCROW tier mappings
Right panel shows Equity Reservoir ($49,018.24), Next Milestone tracker, System Status with Kernel V29.0
LOx Cooling slider at -183°C, Haptic Intensity at 80%
L² Fractal GPU shader rendering at 120 FPS target
context_for_next_testing_agent: V29.0 Autonomous Treasury fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/treasury/status (public), GET /api/treasury/haptic-status (public), GET /api/treasury/cashflow (public), GET /api/treasury/audit (Master only - 403 for others), GET /api/treasury/audit-stream (Master only - 403 for others), POST /api/treasury/voice-command (Master only - 403 for others). Frontend Apex Creator Console at /creator-console shows V29.0 badge, Soft Keys panel, Layer A SOVEREIGN faders with tier mappings, and right panel with Equity Reservoir, Next Milestone, Cash Flow, Autonomous Treasury controls, and System Status.
